nav_style: hidden on scroll down, shows on scroll up
card_style: minimal — no cards, just separated content blocks
scroll_animation: minimal — subtle fade-up on sections (CSS only, short delay)
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
footer_style: playful — with an emoji or easter egg
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: every section uses a different background color
